mapper.select:
SELECT 'ALL' value, '-- ALL 대리점 --' text FROM DUAL UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ORGN_ID AS value ,ORGN_NM AS text FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_LVL_CD ='10' AND TYPE_CD='20' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1='SU' AND TYPE_DTL_CD2 ='SU1' AND ORGN_STAT_CD IN ('1', '4')
AND ORGN_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchAgentNm} || '%'
ORDER BY ORGN_ID, ORGN_NM )

SELECT 'BASIC' value, '-- 일반요금제 --' text FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PPS35' value, '-- RS요금제 --' text FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT value, text FROM ( select RATE_CD value, CASE WHEN (SELECT 'Y' FROM PPS_CODE_SERVICE_TOPUP WHERE SOC = A.RATE_CD AND KT_MODE <> 'TOPUP_REFILL' AND ROWNUM = 1) = 'Y' THEN '(RS) ' || RATE_NM ELSE '(일반) ' || RATE_NM END text from MSP_RATE_MST A where PAY_CL_CD = 'PP' ) ORDER BY TEXT ASC )

SELECT CASE WHEN #{soc} = 'PPS35' THEN 'Y' WHEN (SELECT 'Y' FROM PPS_CODE_SERVICE_TOPUP WHERE SOC = #{soc} AND KT_MODE <> 'TOPUP_REFILL' AND ROWNUM = 1) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END PPS35_FLAG FROM DUAL
